calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
George Chen, Tel. 415.609.2788 and Cindy Wong, Tel. 415.205.1129, Defendants/Third Party Claimants appearing on their own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. George Chen and Cindy Wong's (Third Party) Claim Of Exemption is Granted in its entirety in light of the ruling on the Motion for Relief from Judgment. The Sheriff shall release any funds it is holding to the Judgment Debtor. Order signed in open Court. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Judgment' Pointsa And Authorities, Declaration Of George Chen And Cindy Wong In Support
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
George Chen, Tel. 415.609.2788 and Cindy Wong, Tel. 415.205.1129, Defendants and moving party appearing on their own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs CINDY WONG and GEORGE CHEN's Motion For Relief From Judgment is Granted. Defendants were not properly served with the Summons and Complaint and did not receive actual notice of the suit. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
